package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gin_handler_runs_authorization_business_rules_inline: Handlers that contain complex permission matrices instead of delegating to policy or service logic.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule049NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule049NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule049NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario049Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule049NegativeService, input Rule049NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
